title: Juggling Video Annotation Schema v2.0
description: Ground-truth annotation for a single juggling video clip. Extends v1 with the 18-type contact taxonomy (contact_types_v1.json), source tracking, review lifecycle, and custom_other extensibility. Backward-compatible with v1 skeleton JSONs — all new contact_events fields default to null. The v1 'body_part' field is deprecated; 'contact_type' replaces it. thigh→hip auto-migration is FORBIDDEN.

_policy.custom_other_training_inclusion: FORBIDDEN in any review_status except after promotion to a stable key
_policy.unclassified_custom_training_class: DOES NOT EXIST — removed by design to prevent noisy heterogeneous training labels

annotation_schema_version.description: Schema version — must be '2.0' for this schema.

video_id.description: Stable dataset identifier. Format: jug_b<batch>_<NNN>. Must match dataset_manifest.json.

filename.description: Original video filename without path. Must match the file whose checksum_sha256 was computed.

total_juggling_count.description: Total valid juggling touches. Rejected contact_events (review_status=rejected) must NOT be included in this count.

dominant_body_part.description: Body region responsible for the majority of touches. v2 replaces 'thigh' with 'hip'. Auto-migration from thigh→hip is FORBIDDEN.
dominant_body_part._v1_deprecated_value: thigh — if found in a v1 annotation, set to null and flag for manual review

body_parts_used.description: Which body regions are used at least once. v2 adds 'hip' (replaces 'thigh') and 'back'. thigh→hip auto-migration FORBIDDEN.

hip._note: v2 replaces thigh with hip. Anatomically distinct. No auto-migration from thigh.

back._note: New in v2. Null in migrated v1 annotations.

_deprecated_v1_field.thigh: Deprecated in v2. thigh and hip are anatomically distinct. Do not auto-rename. If thigh=true found in v1 annotation, set manual_review_required=true.

contact_events.description: Frame-level contact events using the v2 18-type taxonomy from contact_types_v1.json. Optional in v2.0; required from Phase D onward.

contact_type.description: Contact type from the v1 taxonomy (contact_types_v1.json). right_* keys fix side=right; left_* keys fix side=left; chest/head/back fix side=center; custom_other requires explicit side.

side.description: Derived from contact_type for stable keys — validators must enforce consistency. Only custom_other allows user-supplied side. right_*→right; left_*→left; chest/head/back→center. Must not be null for custom_other.

annotation_source.description: manual_annotator: browser helper / CLI. manual_user: iOS athlete input. model_prediction: Phase D+ auto-detection. user_corrected: model prediction changed by user/reviewer.

annotator.description: Initials of the person who created this event. Null for model_prediction.

review_status.description: Unified lifecycle status. Stable contact types use: pending/confirmed/corrected/rejected. custom_other uses: pending_taxonomy_review/reclassified/promotion_candidate/promoted/approved_unclassified. rejected events are excluded from total_juggling_count.
review_status._custom_other_note: custom_other is excluded from training in ALL states. The only path to training inclusion is promotion to a new stable key.

excluded_from_training.description: True when this event must not be used as a training label. Always true for custom_other. Also true when review_status is pending, rejected, pending_taxonomy_review, promotion_candidate, or approved_unclassified.

excluded_from_count.description: True when this event must not be included in total_juggling_count. Always true when review_status=rejected.

promotion_candidate.description: True when this custom_other event has been flagged for potential taxonomy promotion. Set by taxonomy reviewer only.

custom_label.description: Required when contact_type=custom_other. Must be null for all stable contact types. Pattern: lowercase letters, digits, underscores only. Must not duplicate an existing stable key.

custom_description.description: Required when contact_type=custom_other. Must be null for stable contact types. Human-readable description of the observed technique.

taxonomy_version.description: The version of contact_types_vN.json used when this event was annotated. Allows future migrations to identify events that predate taxonomy updates.

_deprecated_body_part.description: DEPRECATED. Present only in v1-originated records for backward-compatibility tracing. Do not populate in new annotations. Use contact_type instead.
_deprecated_body_part._thigh_warning: body_part=thigh MUST NOT be auto-migrated to right_hip or left_hip. Flag for manual_review_required.

from_v1.contact_events_body_part: Rename to contact_type. Do not auto-migrate 'thigh' to any hip key.
from_v1.body_parts_used_thigh: Rename field to 'hip' ONLY if human reviewer confirms it was a hip contact. Otherwise null + manual_review_required.
from_v1.dominant_body_part_thigh: Same as above — do not auto-rename.
from_v1.body_parts_used_back: New field, defaults to null in migrated annotations.
from_v1.side_center_value: Add 'center' as valid side value for chest/head/back contact types.
from_v1.four_batch1_skeletons: contact_events=null in all 4 skeletons — no contact_event migration needed. Only schema header fields need updating when v2 is formally adopted.
